content.rendered:
Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS)

Our Services Includes:
  • Preparation of Detailed Project Report
  • Design ITS-based management system with Passenger Information System (PIS), Automatic Vehicle Locating System (AVLS) and Central Control Room (CCR) for City Bus Operations on Build, Own, Operate, Transfer (BOOT) model
  • Bid Process Management for selection of technology partner for ITS-based AVLS, PIS and CCR for CBS
  • Handholding support during the implementation stage
Representative Projects
  • Setting up of IT-based platform and interactive portal for Knowledge Management Centre at the Institute of Urban Transport India
  • Program manager for implementation of ITS for the BRT System of Pimpri-Pune
  • Advisory services for Implementation of ITS for CBS in Noida and Greater Noida
  • Consultancy services for ITS Project under JnNURM for Navi Mumbai Municipal Transport Undertaking
  • Implementation of ITS for BRT system projects in Surat, Amritsar, Ludhiana and Pune
  • Detailed Project Report and ITS implementation support for CBS for the city of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh
  • Design and implementation of operational plan and handholding ITS support for CBS in Raipur, Chhattisgarh
  • Project Management Consultancy for Implementation of Intelligent Transport System including Automated Fare Collection System (AFCS), Vehicle Tracking System (VTS) and Fleet Management System (FMS) for CSTC
  • Project Management Services for enabling operation and management of City Bus Service in Nagpur
  • Consultancy Services for Development of a dashboard to monitor the upcoming Green Urban Mobility (GUM) Scheme of Ministry of Housing and Urban Development (MoHUA) GIZ Dashboard
  • Detailed Project Report (DPR) for Integrated Public Transport Solutions for Greater Kochi Region, Kerala
